name: dhl-brand
description: Machine-readable manifest of DHL brand tokens. Mirrors colors_and_type.css. Source of truth for any script that needs brand values without parsing CSS.

yellow.name: Post Yellow
yellow.role: Primary brand surface, hero backgrounds, primary button fills (with black text)

red.name: DHL Red
red.role: Logo, links, primary CTA on white, alerts, accent strokes

green.use: GoGreen / sustainability marker only. Never decorative.

blue.use: Campaign accent only. Never primary surface.

violet.use: Campaign accent only. Never primary surface.

pairing_law: Text on yellow is always black (#000000).
Text on red is always white (#FFFFFF).
Yellow and red appear together as graphic elements only (chevrons, freeform shapes) — never as text on text.

display.use: Slide hero, title slides. Delivery Condensed Black.

eyebrow.use: Overlines above titles. Delivery Bold, uppercase.

ui_label.use: UI labels, button text. Delivery Bold.

fonts.fallback_rule: Use only if Delivery is genuinely missing. Always flag the substitution to the user.

radii.rule: Squared or lightly-rounded (≤ 8px). Pill chips reserved for tracking-status badges only.

elevation.rule: UI cards use shadow_sm. Floating panels shadow_md. Print/slides use no shadow — flat blocks of yellow do the elevation work.

motion.rule: No bouncy springs. Transitions on color, opacity, transform-translate only — never on width/height.

forbidden: apply drop shadow / glow / blur / hue-rotate / brightness filter
replace with partial mark or icon variant
place over busy photography without sufficient contrast

page_bar.left: Signoff line in red, font-weight 700: 'Excellence. Simply delivered.'

required_on_every_content_slide: Signoff line bottom-left of page bar
Page number bottom-right of page bar

layout_patterns.name: Yellow hero
layout_patterns.key: Post Yellow surface, Delivery Condensed Black headline 140–168px, eyebrow + sub, red chevron stack in a corner

layout_patterns.name: White content
layout_patterns.key: Eyebrow + title + sub + 2-column body with info card (yellow / red / black)

layout_patterns.name: Big stat
layout_patterns.key: Dark background, huge yellow numeral, single supporting line

layout_patterns.name: Two-up comparison
layout_patterns.key: Yellow card + black card side by side, dashed bullets

layout_patterns.name: Pillar grid
layout_patterns.key: 4 cards alternating white / yellow / red / black, each with numeral + headline + line

layout_patterns.name: Yellow closing
layout_patterns.key: Center chevron mark, signoff line, big CTA headline, centered DHL logo

voice.person: Mostly 'you'. 'We' sparingly in B2B copy. Avoid 'one' and 'the user'.
voice.punctuation: Periods after short statements are deliberate — they add rhythm. No exclamation marks except in genuine confirmation toasts.
voice.money_format: ISO code after amount: '€24.50 EUR', '$18.00 USD'
forbidden_in_copy: speed cliches ('at the speed of light', 'faster than ever')
bullet-pointed value props on hero / landing
internal jargon in external copy (ULD, AWB, HAWB) unless audience is freight forwarders

iconography.rule: Lucide substitutes for DHL's internal icon set. If the real library becomes available, swap. Dynamic-element SVGs are decorative blocks — not icons — never inline with text.

forbidden_globally: Inline hard-coded brand hex values (#FFCC00, #D40511) — always use CSS custom properties
Soft drop shadows on yellow surfaces
Blue / green / violet as a primary surface
More than 3 text sizes per slide
validation_checklist: colors_and_type.css linked in every HTML file
Correct logo variant for background, 180px on content slides, no effects
Signoff line on every content slide
Page number on every content slide
Text on yellow is black; text on red is white
No emoji, no gradients, no frosted glass
